purpose: Purest observation-vs-record-review contrast in the batch (503B CDER letter): ISO 5 aseptic-area microbial contamination cited as facility/control evidence (observation_subject) in the 211.42 EM-system violation vs ISO 5 viable-air microbial recovery left uninvestigated as the 211.192 review subject (record_review_subject), with aseptic/smoke/in-process validation (procedure_scope) and a no-FEI negative control.
